detectors.description:
Reentrancy in ISLAM._transfer(address,address,uint256) (ISLAM.sol#645-769):
	External calls:
	- swapTokensForEth(contractTokenBalance) (ISLAM.sol#709)
		- uniswapV2Router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(tokenAmount,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp) (ISLAM.sol#783-795)
	External calls sending eth:
	- sendETHToFee(address(this).balance) (ISLAM.sol#715)
		- _marketingAddress.transfer(amount) (ISLAM.sol#803)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (ISLAM.sol#767)
		- _rOwned[address(this)] = _rOwned[address(this)].add(rTeam) (ISLAM.sol#929)
		- _rOwned[sender] = _rOwned[sender].sub(rAmount) (ISLAM.sol#909)
		- _rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount) (ISLAM.sol#911)
	ISLAM._rOwned (ISLAM.sol#321) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- ISLAM._takeTeam(uint256) (ISLAM.sol#923-931)
	- ISLAM._transferStandard(address,address,uint256) (ISLAM.sol#883-919)
	- ISLAM.balanceOf(address) (ISLAM.sol#471-475)
	- ISLAM.constructor() (ISLAM.sol#405-435)
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (ISLAM.sol#767)
		- _rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee) (ISLAM.sol#937)
	ISLAM._rTotal (ISLAM.sol#333) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- ISLAM._getCurrentSupply() (ISLAM.sol#1079-1089)
	- ISLAM._reflectFee(uint256,uint256) (ISLAM.sol#935-941)
	- ISLAM.constructor() (ISLAM.sol#405-435)
	- ISLAM.tokenFromReflection(uint256) (ISLAM.sol#567-589)
detectors.markdown:

		- [uniswapV2Router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(tokenAmount,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp)](ISLAM.sol#L783-L795)
	External calls sending eth:

		- [_marketingAddress.transfer(amount)](ISLAM.sol#L803)
	State variables written after the call(s):

		- [_rOwned[address(this)] = _rOwned[address(this)].add(rTeam)](ISLAM.sol#L929)
		- [_rOwned[sender] = _rOwned[sender].sub(rAmount)](ISLAM.sol#L909)
		- [_rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount)](ISLAM.sol#L911)
	[ISLAM._rOwned](ISLAM.sol#L321) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- [ISLAM._takeTeam(uint256)](ISLAM.sol#L923-L931)
	- [ISLAM._transferStandard(address,address,uint256)](ISLAM.sol#L883-L919)
	- [ISLAM.balanceOf(address)](ISLAM.sol#L471-L475)
	- [ISLAM.constructor()](ISLAM.sol#L405-L435)
	- [_tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee)](ISLAM.sol#L767)
		- [_rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee)](ISLAM.sol#L937)
	[ISLAM._rTotal](ISLAM.sol#L333) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- [ISLAM._getCurrentSupply()](ISLAM.sol#L1079-L1089)
	- [ISLAM._reflectFee(uint256,uint256)](ISLAM.sol#L935-L941)

	- [ISLAM.tokenFromReflection(uint256)](ISLAM.sol#L567-L589)

		- _taxFee = _previoustaxFee (ISLAM.sol#617)
		- _taxFee = 0 (ISLAM.sol#607)

	- _transfer(sender,recipient,amount) (ISLAM.sol#543)
		- _marketingAddress.transfer(amount) (ISLAM.sol#803)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- _approve(sender,_msgSender(),_allowances[sender][_msgSender()].sub(amount,ERC20: transfer amount exceeds allowance)) (ISLAM.sol#545-559)
		- _allowances[owner][spender] = amount (ISLAM.sol#637)
	Event emitted after the call(s):
	- Approval(owner,spender,amount) (ISLAM.sol#639)
		- _approve(sender,_msgSender(),_allowances[sender][_msgSender()].sub(amount,ERC20: transfer amount exceeds allowance)) (ISLAM.sol#545-559)
